{{Infobox character
| name = Titan
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Dreadgod, one-star Titan
| abilities = golden power, yellow earth madra, molten shield, travel through space, create void portal
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

''See also: [[Titan Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Wandering Titan]] is a massive, ancient entity characterized by its immense scale and slow, inevitable movement. Often appearing as a colossal creature with stone-like skin and a shell resembling an [[island]] or a hill, it possesses features such as human-like five-fingered hands and a long, snake-like tail. It is known to feed on minerals, [[earth aura]], and various forms of energy, including [[soulfire]] and willpower. While it is noted for its lethargy, the Titan can move with great speed and power when necessary, capable of causing massive geological disturbances and exerting immense pressure on its surroundings. It is considered one of the [[Dreadgods]] and has been depicted in murals and legends as a formidable combatant. Additionally, certain groups like the [[Abyssal Palace]] model their paths after its indestructible nature, and individual members of a group known as the [[Titans]] serve in roles such as protectors or formation specialists.}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Titan]] is a being whose whims lives depend on.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Titan]] is a being that [[Ruby]] can feel.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Titan]] is heading east and could wake up within a week.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|As a [[Dreadgod]] possessing golden power, the Titan's approach to the area becomes a significant event that prompts [[Jai Long]] to seek distance and causes the [[Akura clan]] to depart. Standing outside the ruins of [[Mount Venture]], this cracked and craggy entity becomes a threat that [[Yerin]] requires assistance to stop, while [[Northstrider]] maintains his gaze upon it. During the confrontation, [[Akura Malice]] attempts to push the creature away as [[Lindon]] considers stalling the beast and utilizes his advancement to assist. While a ball of stone and chaos forms in its hand and yellow earth madra pulses from its chest, [[Lindon]] runs across the Titan's hand as its foot descends toward [[Mercy]] and the others.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Titan]] is near the area.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Long]] wants to put distance between them and the [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Titan]] is a reason for the [[Akura clan]] to leave.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The approach of a [[Titan]] is a significant event.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Titan]] is potentially moving to kill everyone.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Titan]] is an entity that [[Yerin]] needs help to stop.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14">''Bloodline'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Titan]] is a being [[Northstrider]] does not wish to take his gaze from.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] wonders if the [[Titan]] is in the [[Heaven's Glory]] passageway.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Titan]] is a [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16">''Bloodline'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Titan]] possesses golden power.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura Malice]] was pushing the [[Titan]] away.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Titan]] was standing outside the ruins of [[Mount Venture]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Titan]] is a threat that [[Lindon]] considers stalling.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] intends to use his advancement to help against the [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Titan]]'s body has cracks in its shell and crags all over it.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Titan]]'s arm was pushed slightly by the [[Hollow King]]'s [[Spear]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A ball of stone and chaos formed in the [[Titan]]'s hand.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A wave of yellow earth madra pulsed out from the [[Titan]]'s chest.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] ran across the [[Titan]]'s hand.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A [[Titan]] is a threat that [[Mercy]] and others must face.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Titan]]'s foot is coming down.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The Titan, identified as [[Gadrael]], is a being composed of stone whose location is monitored by the [[Dreadgods]]. As this entity prepared to wake, [[Suriel]] requested a connection to it. The Titan's subsequent attack potentially caused the natural decay of the suppression field by altering its power source. During combat, [[Gadrael]] utilizes a molten shield to defend against [[void]]-beasts. Ultimately, the Titan's defense serves as a vital component in holding the barrier on [[Cradle]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Suriel]] requests to be connected to the [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3">''Reaper'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Titan]] is a being whose location is taken into account by the [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|A [[Titan]] was going to wake up.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Titan]]'s attack may have caused changes in the power source of the suppression field.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The suppression field may have decayed naturally due to damage from the [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9">''Reaper'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Titan]] is made of stone.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Titan]] uses a molten shield to block [[void]]-beasts.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Gadrael]] is the [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The barrier on [[Cradle]] holds with the defense of the [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Considered the least intelligent of the [[Dreadgods]], the Titan is characterized by its intense hunger and blazing yellow eyes. Its immense spiritual pressure possesses the ability to slow the flow of [[madra]], and it can arrive at locations directly by traveling through space. During its presence, the creature displaced people within the city and utilized a [[void portal]]. Ultimately, the [[Silent King]] discovered a method to swap places with the Titan.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Titan]] is considered the least intelligent of the [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Titan]] has blazing yellow eyes.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Titan]]'s spiritual pressure can slow the flow of [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Titan]] possesses hunger.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Titan]] displaced people in the city.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8">''Dreadgod'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Titan]] can travel through space to arrive directly.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Titan]] created a [[void portal]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Silent King]] figured out how to swap places with the [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Titan]] stomps a foot down on [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] had to hold off the [[Titan]] with nine flying swords.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Kiuran]] identifies himself as a one-star [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31">''Waybound'', chapter 31</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Titan]] is one of the common aptitudes for ascendants from [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Titans]] feel a particular claim over [[Threshold]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Cirian]] identifies as being of the [[Titans]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“The Titan. I feel him napping the day away over there.”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“Honored Sage, we must leave! The Titan!”<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“Burn him, then. Monarch, I need your help to stop the Titan.”<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“I, for one, do not wish to take my gaze from the Titan for longer than I must.”<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“Connect me to the Titan,” Suriel interrupted.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
